text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It felt like something was calling me over here,
but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's no one here. Am I hearing things? No,
that's impossible.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Could I have been beckoned here by the
Three Goddesses statue?
